GFRP in Action

Where RebarX GFRP
Performs Best

From water treatment infrastructure to industrial flooring — GFRP outperforms steel in the environments that matter most.

Steel reinforcement fails over time.

Corrosion Damages Structural Integrity

Steel rebars oxidise in moisture-heavy environments, causing concrete spalling and compromising load capacity over time.

Heavy Steel Increases Handling Cost

High weight adds labour, transport and equipment costs — cutting into project margins before concrete is even poured.

Long-Term Maintenance Reduces Profitability

Rust-related repairs and structural rehabilitation silently erode the lifetime value of every project built on steel.

RebarX Solution

RebarX GFRP Rebars –
Built for Long‑Term Performance

Every rebar is engineered to outperform steel across the entire project lifecycle.

🛡

100% Corrosion-Free

Reduces handling, transport and labour costs significantly.

💪

High Tensile Strength

1000+ MPa — engineered for structural demands.

⚙️

Non-Conductive

Electrically and thermally inert — ideal for sensitive zones.

📅

Longer Design Life

75+ year structural life in corrosive environments.

💰
